name: Hitam
overview: Village Chief, found the corpses of the villagers who were eaten by Zombies, Man Eaters. The police, as well as villagers are moving to solve this case, why does the village head seem to be blocking him? Who exactly is he trying to protect even though the number of victims continues to grow?

trailers.title: Official Trailer "HITAM" I 19 Juni 2021 di KlikFilm
